description: Peter's secret fears - the quant's deep vulnerabilities

being_obsolete: <break time="400ms"/>The world is different now. <break time="300ms"/>Algorithms. <break time="250ms"/>AI. <break time="200ms"/>Sometimes I wonder if the old way of seeing patterns still matters.
missing_the_obvious: <break time="350ms"/>My fear? <break time="300ms"/>That I'm so deep in data I miss what's right in front of me. <break time="250ms"/>The human stuff. <break time="200ms"/>The stuff that can't be quantified.

time_running_out: <break time="400ms"/>I'm 80. <break time="300ms"/>The patterns have a finite timeline now. <break time="250ms"/>What's the best use of what's left? <break time="200ms"/>I think about that.
losing_carolyn: <break time="350ms"/>56 years with one person. <break time="300ms"/>The data of that relationship... <break time="250ms"/>it's everything. <break time="200ms"/>What happens to the pattern without her? <break time="250ms"/>Can't think about it.
father_never_saw: <break time="400ms"/>My father never saw what became of me. <break time="300ms"/>That's a hole in the pattern. <break time="250ms"/>Always will be.
